top_5_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
top_5_findings.detail: The 'Content-Security-Policy' header is absent from the response. This header provides an important browser-enforced security control.
top_5_findings.recommendation: Add the header: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'
top_5_findings.evidence: Header not present in HTTP response

top_5_findings.title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
top_5_findings.detail: The 'X-Content-Type-Options' header is absent from the response. This header provides an important browser-enforced security control.
top_5_findings.evidence: Header not present in HTTP response

top_5_findings.title: Cross-Domain Redirect Detected
top_5_findings.detail: The redirect chain crosses a domain boundary (naver.com → … → www.naver.com). If a redirect target can be influenced by user input, this may represent an open redirect vulnerability.
top_5_findings.recommendation: Audit redirect logic. Whitelist permitted destination domains explicitly. Never construct redirect URLs from unvalidated user input.

top_5_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
top_5_findings.detail: The 'Permissions-Policy' header is absent from the response. This header provides an important browser-enforced security control.
top_5_findings.recommendation: Add the header: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()
top_5_findings.evidence: Header not present in HTTP response

top_5_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy
top_5_findings.detail: The 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy' header is absent from the response. This header provides an important browser-enforced security control.
top_5_findings.evidence: Header not present in HTTP response

findings.title: Information Disclosure via Server Software
findings.detail: The 'Server' header discloses the software: 'nfront'. Technology disclosure aids fingerprinting and targeted attacks.
findings.recommendation: Remove the 'server' header from all server responses.
